execution_history.reason: No further major adjustment needed: Portfolio Sharpe (2.50), Sortino (4.27), max drawdown (-17.7%), and beta (0.90) are best in class for a high-growth/correlation-reduced portfolio. Style tilts away from extreme value/volatility toward growth/momentum intentionally reflect user risk/alpha goals. Diversification and cross-sector balance achieved. Iteratively, only minor tweaks (further tiny reduction of FUFU, DGNX, OKLO, NU, FITB) could offer incremental risk-mitigation, but core profile is optimized as targeted.

execution_history.reason: Portfolio finalized. Highest risk-adjusted return (Sharpe 2.50), controlled drawdown (max -17.7%), reduced beta (0.90), and diversified sector/industry footprint achieved. Adds: SYY, KMB, LNG, TSCO, FAST, BAH, CALM, DKL, CLX, COR for defensive, income, and cyclical exposures. Removes: EQIX, FR, TRNO, IIPR, STAG, EXOD, EMQQ, VCSH, WEC, MTSI, MU, SGDM, EIS, AEE, CMS for persistent negative Sharpe, stress risk, or redundancy. Reductions: FUFU, DGNX, OKLO, FITB, NU, INTR for extreme volatility and incremental risk reduction. Portfolio meets alpha, Sharpe, lower beta, and correlation objectives for high-risk, growth-seeking user.
